title: Big Globe - Biome Tags
description: Adds Big Globe's biomes to vanilla and Tough As Nails biome tags
body: This datapack adds biome tags from [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe) to biome tags from vanilla and [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails), which makes TaN's temperature system work properly and allows for custom structures that use vanilla biome tags to generate in Big Globe worlds.
